summary: Justin Brennan conducts a Q&A mentorship session covering market selection strategies, deal sourcing approaches, and mindset/visualization techniques. While not directly analyzing specific deals, the discussion emphasizes broker relationships, three-day market reconnaissance missions, using AI tools for market research, and avoiding common pitfalls like Section 8 properties for first-time investors.
takeaways: Plan a '3-day reconnaissance mission' to target market: tour 3 properties, meet 2-3 brokers, interview 2-3 PM companies, and connect with 3 renovation crews (the '3-3-3' rule)
Use ChatGPT/AI to identify markets by prompting: 'population growth north of 1%, job growth of 1%, median household income $60,000+' then dive deeper with follow-up questions
Build a 'vision letter' (one page, three paragraphs: personal/professional/health-wellness) written in future tense as of Dec 31, 2025, and read it every single day
'Inch wide and a mile deep' - narrow to one primary market after analyzing three, then commit fully with pre-positioned team before deals flow
Only pursue Section 8/PSH deals if in your 'backyard' (20-minute drive) due to resident screening risk; guaranteed income not worth property damage/destruction risk for first deals
Face-to-face/belly-to-belly broker meetings create off-market deal flow that phone/Zoom cannot replicate; this breaks through the '60-90 day resistance point'
When evaluating markets, use AI to research city development plans: 'Tell me where the city is putting money in development' for best investment location insights

skill_candidates.change: Use AI tools (ChatGPT/Gemini) to systematically screen markets by population/job/income criteria instead of manual website research
skill_candidates.evidence: Justin demonstrates asking ChatGPT 'top 5 markets with 1% population growth, 1% job growth, $60k+ median income' and layers follow-up prompts; also shows asking AI to research city development plans for Boise to identify best investment zones

skill_candidates.change: Replace phone-only broker outreach with planned in-person 3-day market visits to build relationships and unlock off-market deals
skill_candidates.evidence: John admitted losing deals to cash buyers; Justin prescribed: 'There's no replacement for belly-to-belly...you start to see deals happen that otherwise would not.' He structures this as Sunday arrival + Monday broker/PM/contractor tours + exit Tuesday

skill_candidates.change: Implement daily vision letter reading (1-page forward-dated letter describing 3 deal closings by Dec 31) to align emotions/frequency with deal acquisition goals
skill_candidates.evidence: Justin explains vision letters create emotional alignment: 'your body vibrates...align with frequencies and then stuff will start to pop.' Recommends John specifically write '27 unit building LOI accepted' in professional section and re-read daily

title: Tuesday Mentorship Q&A_05-06-25 | Justin Brennan
